name: download
description: A single downloadable file rendered as a download button. Resolves file_id through the media map (url, filename, mime, human size are pre-baked) — no WP attachment calls at render. Visually reuses the callout 'files' treatment. Emitted by the loothprint/loothcut conversion as a bare { type: download, file_id }.

file_id.description: Attachment ID of the downloadable file. Resolved to a URL + filename + size via the media map.

url.description: Explicit download URL. Overrides file_id resolution when set (e.g. off-site file).

label.description: Override for the row label. Empty falls back to the file's title, then its filename, then 'Download File'.

title.description: Eyebrow shown above the download row. Empty = no eyebrow.
